PropertyTypes.Caption: Marker
PropertyTypes.Description: A list of static locations on the map.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Address
PropertyTypes.Description: Address containing (a subset of) street, number, zipcode, city and country.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Latitude
PropertyTypes.Description: Decimal number from -90.0 to 90.0.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Longitude
PropertyTypes.Description: Decimal number from -180.0 to 180.0.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Title
PropertyTypes.Description: Title displayed when clicking the marker.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Image
PropertyTypes.Description: Image that replaces the default icon.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Marker list
PropertyTypes.Description: A list of markers showing dynamic locations on the map.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Address
PropertyTypes.Description: Address containing (a subset of) street, number, zipcode, city and country.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Latitude
PropertyTypes.Description: Decimal number from -90.0 to 90.0.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Longitude
PropertyTypes.Description: Decimal number from -180.0 to 180.0.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Title
PropertyTypes.Description: Title displayed when clicking the marker.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Image
PropertyTypes.Description: Image that replaces the default icon.

PropertyTypes.Caption: API Key
PropertyTypes.Description: API Key for usage of the map through the selected provider.Google Maps - https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/javascript/get-api-key Map Box - https://docs.mapbox.com/help/getting-started/access-tokens/ Here Maps - https://developer.here.com/tutorials/getting-here-credentials/

PropertyTypes.Caption: API Key
PropertyTypes.Description: API Key for usage of the map through the selected provider.Google Maps - https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/javascript/get-api-key Map Box - https://docs.mapbox.com/help/getting-started/access-tokens/ Here Maps - https://developer.here.com/tutorials/getting-here-credentials/

PropertyTypes.Caption: Geo location API key
PropertyTypes.Description: Used to translate addresses to latitude and longitude. This API Key should be a Google Geocoding API Key found in https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/geocoding/overview

PropertyTypes.Caption: Geo location API key
PropertyTypes.Description: Used to translate addresses to latitude and longitude. This API Key should be a Google Geocoding API Key found in https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/geocoding/overview

PropertyTypes.Caption: Show current location marker
PropertyTypes.Description: Shows the user current location marker.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Drag
PropertyTypes.Description: The center will move when end-users drag the map.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Scroll to zoom
PropertyTypes.Description: The map is zoomed with a mouse scroll.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Zoom
PropertyTypes.Description: Show zoom controls [ + ] [ - ].

PropertyTypes.Caption: Attribution control
PropertyTypes.Description: Add attributions to the map (credits).

PropertyTypes.Caption: Street view
PropertyTypes.Description: Enables the Street View control.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Map type
PropertyTypes.Description: Enables switching between different map types.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Width unit
PropertyTypes.Description: Percentage: portion of parent size. Pixels: absolute amount of pixels.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Google MapId key
PropertyTypes.Description: Used to render and style the Google map. This MapId key from Google can be found in https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/get-map-id
